ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name associated with the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the account */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions associated with the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., token, other) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last updated */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "network" TEXT /* Blockchain network the account belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "network" TEXT /* Blockchain network associated with the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "network" TEXT /* Blockchain network associated with the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)
